name: Technical Issues
text: Give to the Tony Stark player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Tony Stark and Tony's Workshop → remove Technical Issues from the game. • Remove 2 reactor counters from your identity. If no reactor counters were removed this way, this card gains surge. Discard this obligation.

flavor: Whiplash has seized control of a power plant, threatening to overload the transformers if his demands are not met.
name: Imminent Overload
text: When Revealed: Place an additional 1 [per_hero] threat here.

flavor: “You started this, Tony. I will finish it.”
name: Whiplash
text: Retaliate 1. (After this character is attacked, deal 1 damage to the attacking character.)

name: Electric Whip Attack
text:
When Revealed: Choose to either deal 1 damage to your hero for each upgrade you control or choose and discard an upgrade you control.
[star] Boost: If the villain is making an undefended attack, choose and discard an upgrade you control.

name: Electromagnetic Backlash
text: When Revealed: Each player discards the top 5 cards of their deck. For each printed [energy] resource a player discards this way, that player takes 1 damage.
